landing.title: Learn German.
landing.subtitle: The only German LMS built for Cameroon. Reach A1→C1 with AI-powered practice, native audio, and real embassy simulation.
landing.featuresSubtitle: 12 integrated AI tools for complete learning
landing.levelsSubtitle: Based on Netzwerk neu (A1-B1) and Aspekte neu (B2-C1)
landing.centerDesc: Centralized dashboard to manage all your teachers, students and classes. Real-time tracking, advanced analytics and simplified billing.
landing.faq1Q: How does the embassy simulator work?
landing.faq1A: You have a real-time conversation with Herr Bauer, a virtual consular officer. He evaluates your German and gives you a detailed score after each exchange.
landing.faq2Q: Is the free plan really free?
landing.faq2A: Yes, completely free. No credit card required. Full access to A1 level with 3 lessons per day and 3 simulator sessions per month.
landing.faq3A: Goethe-Zertifikat exams are recognized worldwide for German visas. Yema specifically prepares you for these exams from A1 to C1.
landing.faq4Q: Can I join a teacher's class?
landing.faq4A: Yes! Enter your teacher's class code when registering or from your dashboard. Your teacher will validate your access.
landing.faq5A: The platform is optimized for mobile (iOS and Android) via the browser. A native app is in development.
landing.faq6Q: How to become a partner center?
landing.faq6A: Contact us on WhatsApp. We offer 30 free days to test the center solution with your team.
landing.ctaFinalDesc: No credit card. No commitment. Immediate access to the full A1 level.
landing.ctaFinalSocial: Already 10,000+ learners in Cameroon and Africa
landing.simDesc: Herr Bauer, our AI consul, asks you the real questions from a German visa interview. Each answer is analyzed and scored on grammar, vocabulary and relevance.
landing.feature1Desc: Practice with Herr Bauer, virtual German consul. Real-time scoring on grammar, vocabulary and relevance.
landing.feature2Desc: Authentic German voices. Dialogues adapted to each level A1→C1.
landing.feature3Desc: Speak German, AI analyzes your pronunciation and corrects your errors instantly.
landing.feature4Desc: Write in German, Gemini corrects grammar, vocabulary and style with detailed explanations.
landing.feature5Desc: Difficulty adjusts automatically to your performance. The better you get, the more challenging.
landing.feature6Desc: Join a teacher's class or create your study group. Real-time tracking.
landing.feature7Desc: Full dashboard for language centers. Manage teachers, students and classes from one place.
landing.feature8Desc: Track your progress on 5 skills: Lesen, Hören, Sprechen, Schreiben, Grammatik.
landing.testimonial1Text: In 6 months, I reached B1 thanks to the embassy simulator. My visa interview went perfectly!
landing.testimonial2Text: My students progress 2× faster with AI tools. Automatic correction saves me precious time.
landing.testimonial3Text: 150 students managed from a single dashboard. Progress analytics are excellent.
landing.simMsg1: Good day. Please show me your passport.
landing.simMsg2: Good day, Mr. Bauer. Here is my passport.
landing.simMsg3: Why do you want to study in Germany?

centerLanding.heroSubtitle: Manage teachers, students, assignments and payments from one platform. With AI embassy simulator and advanced analytics.
centerLanding.featuresSubtitle: A complete suite designed for Cameroonian language institutes
centerLanding.feat1Desc: Full dashboard per student: XP, progress, quiz scores, embassy simulator history. Instantly identify struggling students.
centerLanding.feat2Desc: Herr Klaus Bauer, our AI consul, trains your students for the embassy interview in real situations. Grammar, vocabulary and fluency scores each session.
centerLanding.feat3Desc: Subscriptions and course fees collected via MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money. No bank account needed. Full transaction history.
centerLanding.feat4Desc: D-30/60/90 retention rates, teacher rankings, A1→C1 progress, CSV export. Make data-driven decisions.
centerLanding.feat5Desc: Create as many classes as needed. Unique access codes, assignment management, online corrections, chat with students.
centerLanding.feat6Desc: English and French interface, content centered on Cameroonian culture, prices in FCFA, connection optimized for local networks.
centerLanding.pricingSubtitle: No hidden fees. Monthly payment by Mobile Money.
centerLanding.testimonial1Quote: Since Yema, we've reduced our administration time by 60%. Our students progress twice as fast thanks to the embassy simulator. The visa success rate for our learners went from 45% to 78%.
centerLanding.testimonial2Quote: Mobile Money billing was a game-changer. Our students now pay from their phone in 2 minutes. We increased our renewal rate by 40%.
centerLanding.testimonial3Quote: The analytics are impressive. I see in real time which students are struggling and intervene before they drop out. Our 90-day retention went from 38% to 64%.
centerLanding.faq1Q: How do I migrate my existing data?
centerLanding.faq1A: Our team assists with a free migration of your student data from Excel, Google Sheets or any other system in under 48h.
centerLanding.faq2A: Yes, we use official MTN MoMo and Orange Money APIs with end-to-end encryption. All transactions are logged and auditable.
centerLanding.faq3A: Absolutely. The Starter plan is free for the first month with all Pro features included. No credit card required.
centerLanding.faq4A: Yes, every account includes 2h of online training and access to our knowledge base. The Enterprise plan includes on-site training.
centerLanding.contactSubtitle: Our team will call you back within 24h for a personalized demonstration.
centerLanding.contactFree: First month free · No credit card required
centerLanding.contactSuccessDesc: Our team will contact you within 24 business hours. In the meantime, you can create your account for free.
